meta.title: Contact | Al-Hayaat School
meta.description: Get in touch with Al-Hayaat School. We'd love to hear from you.

hero.heading: Contact
hero.subtext: We would love to hear from you! If you have any questions or would like more information about Al-Hayaat School, please feel free to contact us using the information below.

form.heading: Send us a Message
form.success_message: Thank you! Your submission has been received!
form.error_message: Oops! Something went wrong while submitting the form.
form.coming_soon_note: Form submission coming soon. In the meantime, please email us directly at info@alhayaat.ca.

cta.heading: Join Our Community
cta.body: Together, we're building a brighter future for our children and the community.
